text: archē tou euangeliou iēsou christou uiou tou theou
ōs gegraptai en tois prophētais idou egō apostellō ton angelon mou pro prosōpou sou os kataskeuasei tēn odon sou emprosthen sou
phōnē boōntos en tē erēmō etoimasate tēn odon kyriou eutheias poieite tas tribous autou
egeneto iōannēs baptizōn en tē erēmō kai kēryssōn baptisma metanoias eis aphesin amartiōn
kai exeporeueto pros auton pasa ē ioudaia chōra kai oi ierosolymitai kai ebaptizonto pantes en tō iordanē potamō yp autou exomologoumenoi tas amartias autōn
ēn de iōannēs endedymenos trichas kamēlou kai zōnēn dermatinēn peri tēn osphyn autou kai esthiōn akridas kai meli agrion
kai ekēryssen legōn erchetai o ischyroteros mou opisō mou ou ouk eimi ikanos kypsas lysai ton imanta tōn ypodēmatōn autou
egō men ebaptisa ymas en ydati autos de baptisei ymas en pneumati agiō
kai egeneto en ekeinais tais ēmerais ēlthen iēsous apo nazareth tēs galilaias kai ebaptisthē ypo iōannou eis ton iordanēn
kai eutheōs anabainōn apo tou ydatos eiden schizomenous tous ouranous kai to pneuma ōsei peristeran katabainon ep auton
kai phōnē egeneto ek tōn ouranōn sy ei o uios mou o agapētos en ō eudokēsa
kai euthys to pneuma auton ekballei eis tēn erēmon
kai ēn ekei en tē erēmō ēmeras tessarakonta peirazomenos ypo tou satana kai ēn meta tōn thēriōn kai oi angeloi diēkonoun autō
meta de to paradothēnai ton iōannēn ēlthen o iēsous eis tēn galilaian kēryssōn to euangelion tēs basileias tou theou
kai legōn oti peplērōtai o kairos kai ēngiken ē basileia tou theou metanoeite kai pisteuete en tō euangeliō
peripatōn de para tēn thalassan tēs galilaias eiden simōna kai andrean ton adelphon autou ballontas amphiblēstron en tē thalassē ēsan gar alieis
kai eipen autois o iēsous deute opisō mou kai poiēsō ymas genesthai alieis anthrōpōn
kai eutheōs aphentes ta diktya autōn ēkolouthēsan autō
kai probas ekeithen oligon eiden iakōbon ton tou zebedaiou kai iōannēn ton adelphon autou kai autous en tō ploiō katartizontas ta diktya
kai eutheōs ekalesen autous kai aphentes ton patera autōn zebedaion en tō ploiō meta tōn misthōtōn apēlthon opisō autou
kai eisporeuontai eis kapernaoum kai eutheōs tois sabbasin eiselthōn eis synagōgēn edidasken
kai exeplēssonto epi tē didachē autou ēn gar didaskōn autous ōs exousian echōn kai ouch ōs oi grammateis
kai ēn en tē synagōgē autōn anthrōpos en pneumati akathartō kai anekraxen
legōn ea ti ēmin kai soi iēsou nazarēne ēlthes apolesai ēmas oida se tis ei o agios tou theou
kai epetimēsen autō o iēsous legōn phimōthēti kai exelthe ex autou
kai sparaxan auton to pneuma to akatharton kai kraxan phōnē megalē exēlthen ex autou
kai ethambēthēsan pantes ōste syzētein pros autous legontas ti estin touto tis ē didachē ē kainē autē oti kat exousian kai tois pneumasin tois akathartois epitassei kai ypakouousin autō
exēlthen de ē akoē autou euthys eis olēn tēn perichōron tēs galilaias
kai eutheōs ek tēs synagōgēs exelthontes ēlthon eis tēn oikian simōnos kai andreou meta iakōbou kai iōannou
ē de penthera simōnos katekeito pyressousa kai eutheōs legousin autō peri autēs
kai proselthōn ēgeiren autēn kratēsas tēs cheiros autēs kai aphēken autēn o pyretos eutheōs kai diēkonei autois
opsias de genomenēs ote edy o ēlios epheron pros auton pantas tous kakōs echontas kai tous daimonizomenous
kai ē polis olē episynēgmenē ēn pros tēn thyran
kai etherapeusen pollous kakōs echontas poikilais nosois kai daimonia polla exebalen kai ouk ēphien lalein ta daimonia oti ēdeisan auton
kai prōi ennychon lian anastas exēlthen kai apēlthen eis erēmon topon kakei prosēucheto
kai katediōxan auton o simōn kai oi met autou
kai eurontes auton legousin autō oti pantes zētousin se
kai legei autois agōmen eis tas echomenas kōmopoleis ina kakei kēryxō eis touto gar exelēlytha
kai ēn kēryssōn en tais synagōgais autōn eis olēn tēn galilaian kai ta daimonia ekballōn
kai erchetai pros auton lepros parakalōn auton kai gonypetōn auton kai legōn autō oti ean thelēs dynasai me katharisai
o de iēsous splanchnistheis ekteinas tēn cheira ēpsato autou kai legei autō thelō katharisthēti
kai eipontos autou eutheōs apēlthen ap autou ē lepra kai ekatharisthē
kai embrimēsamenos autō eutheōs exebalen auton
kai legei autō ora mēdeni mēden eipēs all ypage seauton deixon tō ierei kai prosenenke peri tou katharismou sou a prosetaxen mōsēs eis martyrion autois
o de exelthōn ērxato kēryssein polla kai diaphēmizein ton logon ōste mēketi auton dynasthai phanerōs eis polin eiselthein all exō en erēmois topois ēn kai ērchonto pros auton pantachothen
kai palin eisēlthen eis kapernaoum di ēmerōn kai ēkousthē oti eis oikon estin
kai eutheōs synēchthēsan polloi ōste mēketi chōrein mēde ta pros tēn thyran kai elalei autois ton logon
kai erchontai pros auton paralytikon pherontes airomenon ypo tessarōn
kai mē dynamenoi prosengisai autō dia ton ochlon apestegasan tēn stegēn opou ēn kai exoryxantes chalōsin ton krabbaton eph ō o paralytikos katekeito
idōn de o iēsous tēn pistin autōn legei tō paralytikō teknon apheōntai soi ai amartiai sou
ēsan de tines tōn grammateōn ekei kathēmenoi kai dialogizomenoi en tais kardiais autōn
ti outos outōs lalei blasphēmias tis dynatai aphienai amartias ei mē eis o theos
kai eutheōs epignous o iēsous tō pneumati autou oti outōs dialogizontai en eautois eipen autois ti tauta dialogizesthe en tais kardiais ymōn
ti estin eukopōteron eipein tō paralytikō apheōntai soi ai amartiai ē eipein egeirai kai aron sou ton krabbaton kai peripatei
ina de eidēte oti exousian echei o uios tou anthrōpou aphienai epi tēs gēs amartias legei tō paralytikō
soi legō egeirai kai aron ton krabbaton sou kai ypage eis ton oikon sou
kai ēgerthē eutheōs kai aras ton krabbaton exēlthen enantion pantōn ōste existasthai pantas kai doxazein ton theon legontas oti oudepote outōs eidomen
kai exēlthen palin para tēn thalassan kai pas o ochlos ērcheto pros auton kai edidasken autous
kai paragōn eiden leuin ton tou alphaiou kathēmenon epi to telōnion kai legei autō akolouthei moi kai anastas ēkolouthēsen autō
kai egeneto en tō katakeisthai auton en tē oikia autou kai polloi telōnai kai amartōloi synanekeinto tō iēsou kai tois mathētais autou ēsan gar polloi kai ēkolouthēsan autō
kai oi grammateis kai oi pharisaioi idontes auton esthionta meta tōn telōnōn kai amartōlōn elegon tois mathētais autou ti oti meta tōn telōnōn kai amartōlōn esthiei kai pinei
kai akousas o iēsous legei autois ou chreian echousin oi ischyontes iatrou all oi kakōs echontes ouk ēlthon kalesai dikaious alla amartōlous eis metanoian
kai ēsan oi mathētai iōannou kai oi tōn pharisaiōn nēsteuontes kai erchontai kai legousin autō dia ti oi mathētai iōannou kai oi tōn pharisaiōn nēsteuousin oi de soi mathētai ou nēsteuousin
kai eipen autois o iēsous mē dynantai oi uioi tou nymphōnos en ō o nymphios met autōn estin nēsteuein oson chronon meth eautōn echousin ton nymphion ou dynantai nēsteuein
eleusontai de ēmerai otan aparthē ap autōn o nymphios kai tote nēsteusousin en ekeinais tais ēmerais
kai oudeis epiblēma rakous agnaphou epirraptei epi imatiō palaiō ei de mē airei to plērōma autou to kainon tou palaiou kai cheiron schisma ginetai
kai oudeis ballei oinon neon eis askous palaious ei de mē rēssei o oinos o neos tous askous kai o oinos ekcheitai kai oi askoi apolountai alla oinon neon eis askous kainous blēteon
kai egeneto paraporeuesthai auton en tois sabbasin dia tōn sporimōn kai ērxanto oi mathētai autou odon poiein tillontes tous stachyas
kai oi pharisaioi elegon autō ide ti poiousin en tois sabbasin o ouk exestin
kai autos elegen autois oudepote anegnōte ti epoiēsen dabid ote chreian eschen kai epeinasen autos kai oi met autou
pōs eisēlthen eis ton oikon tou theou epi abiathar tou archiereōs kai tous artous tēs protheseōs ephagen ous ouk exestin phagein ei mē tois iereusin kai edōken kai tois syn autō ousin
kai elegen autois to sabbaton dia ton anthrōpon egeneto ouch o anthrōpos dia to sabbaton
ōste kyrios estin o uios tou anthrōpou kai tou sabbatou
kai eisēlthen palin eis tēn synagōgēn kai ēn ekei anthrōpos exērammenēn echōn tēn cheira
kai paretēroun auton ei tois sabbasin therapeusei auton ina katēgorēsōsin autou
kai legei tō anthrōpō tō exērammenēn echonti tēn cheira egeirai eis to meson
kai legei autois exestin tois sabbasin agathopoiēsai ē kakopoiēsai psychēn sōsai ē apokteinai oi de esiōpōn
kai periblepsamenos autous met orgēs syllypoumenos epi tē pōrōsei tēs kardias autōn legei tō anthrōpō ekteinon tēn cheira sou kai exeteinen kai apokatestathē ē cheir autou ygiēs ōs ē allē
kai exelthontes oi pharisaioi eutheōs meta tōn ērōdianōn symboulion epoioun kat autou opōs auton apolesōsin
kai o iēsous anechōrēsen meta tōn mathētōn autou pros tēn thalassan kai poly plēthos apo tēs galilaias ēkolouthēsan autō kai apo tēs ioudaias
kai apo ierosolymōn kai apo tēs idoumaias kai peran tou iordanou kai oi peri tyron kai sidōna plēthos poly akousantes osa epoiei ēlthon pros auton
kai eipen tois mathētais autou ina ploiarion proskarterē autō dia ton ochlon ina mē thlibōsin auton
pollous gar etherapeusen ōste epipiptein autō ina autou apsōntai osoi eichon mastigas
kai ta pneumata ta akatharta otan auton etheōrei prosepipten autō kai ekrazen legonta oti sy ei o uios tou theou
kai polla epetima autois ina mē auton phaneron poiēsōsin
kai anabainei eis to oros kai proskaleitai ous ēthelen autos kai apēlthon pros auton
kai epoiēsen dōdeka ina ōsin met autou kai ina apostellē autous kēryssein
kai echein exousian therapeuein tas nosous kai ekballein ta daimonia
kai epethēken tō simōni onoma petron
kai iakōbon ton tou zebedaiou kai iōannēn ton adelphon tou iakōbou kai epethēken autois onomata boanerges o estin uioi brontēs
kai andrean kai philippon kai bartholomaion kai matthaion kai thōman kai iakōbon ton tou alphaiou kai thaddaion kai simōna ton kananitēn
kai ioudan iskariōtēn os kai paredōken auton kai erchontai eis oikon
kai synerchetai palin ochlos ōste mē dynasthai autous mēte arton phagein
kai akousantes oi par autou exēlthon kratēsai auton elegon gar oti exestē
kai oi grammateis oi apo ierosolymōn katabantes elegon oti beelzeboul echei kai oti en tō archonti tōn daimoniōn ekballei ta daimonia
kai proskalesamenos autous en parabolais elegen autois pōs dynatai satanas satanan ekballein
kai ean basileia eph eautēn meristhē ou dynatai stathēnai ē basileia ekeinē
kai ean oikia eph eautēn meristhē ou dynatai stathēnai ē oikia ekeinē
kai ei o satanas anestē eph eauton kai memeristai ou dynatai stathēnai alla telos echei
ou dynatai oudeis ta skeuē tou ischyrou eiselthōn eis tēn oikian autou diarpasai ean mē prōton ton ischyron dēsē kai tote tēn oikian autou diarpasei
amēn legō ymin oti panta aphethēsetai ta amartēmata tois uiois tōn anthrōpōn kai blasphēmiai osas an blasphēmēsōsin
os d an blasphēmēsē eis to pneuma to agion ouk echei aphesin eis ton aiōna all enochos estin aiōniou kriseōs
oti elegon pneuma akatharton echei
erchontai oun oi adelphoi kai ē mētēr autou kai exō estōtes apesteilan pros auton phōnountes auton
kai ekathēto ochlos peri auton eipon de autō idou ē mētēr sou kai oi adelphoi sou exō zētousin se
kai apekrithē autois legōn tis estin ē mētēr mou ē oi adelphoi mou
kai periblepsamenos kyklō tous peri auton kathēmenous legei ide ē mētēr mou kai oi adelphoi mou
os gar an poiēsē to thelēma tou theou outos adelphos mou kai adelphē mou kai mētēr estin
kai palin ērxato didaskein para tēn thalassan kai synēchthē pros auton ochlos polys ōste auton embanta eis to ploion kathēsthai en tē thalassē kai pas o ochlos pros tēn thalassan epi tēs gēs ēn
kai edidasken autous en parabolais polla kai elegen autois en tē didachē autou
akouete idou exēlthen o speirōn tou speirai
kai egeneto en tō speirein o men epesen para tēn odon kai ēlthen ta peteina tou ouranou kai katephagen auto
allo de epesen epi to petrōdes opou ouk eichen gēn pollēn kai eutheōs exaneteilen dia to mē echein bathos gēs
ēliou de anateilantos ekaumatisthē kai dia to mē echein rizan exēranthē
kai allo epesen eis tas akanthas kai anebēsan ai akanthai kai synepnixan auto kai karpon ouk edōken
kai allo epesen eis tēn gēn tēn kalēn kai edidou karpon anabainonta kai auxanonta kai epheren en triakonta kai en exēkonta kai en ekaton
kai elegen autois o echōn ōta akouein akouetō
ote de egeneto katamonas ērōtēsan auton oi peri auton syn tois dōdeka tēn parabolēn
kai elegen autois ymin dedotai gnōnai to mystērion tēs basileias tou theou ekeinois de tois exō en parabolais ta panta ginetai
ina blepontes blepōsin kai mē idōsin kai akouontes akouōsin kai mē syniōsin mēpote epistrepsōsin kai aphethē autois ta amartēmata
kai legei autois ouk oidate tēn parabolēn tautēn kai pōs pasas tas parabolas gnōsesthe
o speirōn ton logon speirei
outoi de eisin oi para tēn odon opou speiretai o logos kai otan akousōsin eutheōs erchetai o satanas kai airei ton logon ton esparmenon en tais kardiais autōn
kai outoi eisin omoiōs oi epi ta petrōdē speiromenoi oi otan akousōsin ton logon eutheōs meta charas lambanousin auton
kai ouk echousin rizan en eautois alla proskairoi eisin eita genomenēs thlipseōs ē diōgmou dia ton logon eutheōs skandalizontai
kai outoi eisin oi eis tas akanthas speiromenoi outoi eisin oi ton logon akouontes
kai ai merimnai tou aiōnos toutou kai ē apatē tou ploutou kai ai peri ta loipa epithymiai eisporeuomenai sympnigousin ton logon kai akarpos ginetai
kai outoi eisin oi epi tēn gēn tēn kalēn sparentes oitines akouousin ton logon kai paradechontai kai karpophorousin en triakonta kai en exēkonta kai en ekaton
kai elegen autois mēti o lychnos erchetai ina ypo ton modion tethē ē ypo tēn klinēn ouch ina epi tēn lychnian epitethē
ou gar estin ti krypton o ean mē phanerōthē oude egeneto apokryphon all ina eis phaneron elthē
ei tis echei ōta akouein akouetō
kai elegen autois blepete ti akouete en ō metrō metreite metrēthēsetai ymin kai prostethēsetai ymin tois akouousin
os gar an echē dothēsetai autō kai os ouk echei kai o echei arthēsetai ap autou
kai elegen outōs estin ē basileia tou theou ōs ean anthrōpos balē ton sporon epi tēs gēs
kai katheudē kai egeirētai nykta kai ēmeran kai o sporos blastanē kai mēkynētai ōs ouk oiden autos
automatē gar ē gē karpophorei prōton chorton eita stachyn eita plērē siton en tō stachui
otan de paradō o karpos eutheōs apostellei to drepanon oti parestēken o therismos
kai elegen tini omoiōsōmen tēn basileian tou theou ē en poia parabolē parabalōmen autēn
ōs kokkō sinapeōs os otan sparē epi tēs gēs mikroteros pantōn tōn spermatōn estin tōn epi tēs gēs
kai otan sparē anabainei kai ginetai pantōn tōn lachanōn meizōn kai poiei kladous megalous ōste dynasthai ypo tēn skian autou ta peteina tou ouranou kataskēnoun
kai toiautais parabolais pollais elalei autois ton logon kathōs ēdynanto akouein
chōris de parabolēs ouk elalei autois kat idian de tois mathētais autou epelyen panta
kai legei autois en ekeinē tē ēmera opsias genomenēs dielthōmen eis to peran
kai aphentes ton ochlon paralambanousin auton ōs ēn en tō ploiō kai alla de ploiaria ēn met autou
kai ginetai lailaps anemou megalē ta de kymata epeballen eis to ploion ōste auto ēdē gemizesthai
kai ēn autos epi tē prymnē epi to proskephalaion katheudōn kai diegeirousin auton kai legousin autō didaskale ou melei soi oti apollymetha
kai diegertheis epetimēsen tō anemō kai eipen tē thalassē siōpa pephimōso kai ekopasen o anemos kai egeneto galēnē megalē
kai eipen autois ti deiloi este outōs pōs ouk echete pistin
kai ephobēthēsan phobon megan kai elegon pros allēlous tis ara outos estin oti kai o anemos kai ē thalassa ypakouousin autō
kai ēlthon eis to peran tēs thalassēs eis tēn chōran tōn gadarēnōn
kai exelthonti autō ek tou ploiou eutheōs apēntēsen autō ek tōn mnēmeiōn anthrōpos en pneumati akathartō
os tēn katoikēsin eichen en tois mnēmeiois kai oute alysesin oudeis ēdynato auton dēsai
dia to auton pollakis pedais kai alysesin dedesthai kai diespasthai yp autou tas alyseis kai tas pedas syntetriphthai kai oudeis auton ischyen damasai
kai diapantos nyktos kai ēmeras en tois oresin kai en tois mnēmasin ēn krazōn kai katakoptōn eauton lithois
idōn de ton iēsoun apo makrothen edramen kai prosekynēsen autō
kai kraxas phōnē megalē eipen ti emoi kai soi iēsou uie tou theou tou ypsistou orkizō se ton theon mē me basanisēs
elegen gar autō exelthe to pneuma to akatharton ek tou anthrōpou
kai epērōta auton ti soi onoma kai apekrithē legōn legeōn onoma moi oti polloi esmen
kai parekalei auton polla ina mē autous aposteilē exō tēs chōras
ēn de ekei pros ta orē agelē choirōn megalē boskomenē
kai parekalesan auton pantes oi daimones legontes pempson ēmas eis tous choirous ina eis autous eiselthōmen

kai epetrepsen autois eutheōs o iēsous kai exelthonta ta pneumata ta akatharta eisēlthon eis tous choirous kai ōrmēsen ē agelē kata tou krēmnou eis tēn thalassan ēsan de ōs dischilioi kai epnigonto en tē thalassē
oi de boskontes tous choirous ephygon kai anēngeilan eis tēn polin kai eis tous agrous kai exēlthon idein ti estin to gegonos
kai erchontai pros ton iēsoun kai theōrousin ton daimonizomenon kathēmenon kai imatismenon kai sōphronounta ton eschēkota ton legeōna kai ephobēthēsan
kai diēgēsanto autois oi idontes pōs egeneto tō daimonizomenō kai peri tōn choirōn
kai ērxanto parakalein auton apelthein apo tōn oriōn autōn
kai embantos autou eis to ploion parekalei auton o daimonistheis ina ē met autou
o de iēsous ouk aphēken auton alla legei autō ypage eis ton oikon sou pros tous sous kai anangeilon autois osa soi o kyrios epoiēsen kai ēleēsen se
kai apēlthen kai ērxato kēryssein en tē dekapolei osa epoiēsen autō o iēsous kai pantes ethaumazon
kai diaperasantos tou iēsou en tō ploiō palin eis to peran synēchthē ochlos polys ep auton kai ēn para tēn thalassan
kai idou erchetai eis tōn archisynagōgōn onomati iaeiros kai idōn auton piptei pros tous podas autou
kai parekalei auton polla legōn oti to thygatrion mou eschatōs echei ina elthōn epithēs autē tas cheiras opōs sōthē kai zēsetai
kai apēlthen met autou kai ēkolouthei autō ochlos polys kai synethlibon auton
kai gynē tis ousa en rysei aimatos etē dōdeka
kai polla pathousa ypo pollōn iatrōn kai dapanēsasa ta par eautēs panta kai mēden ōphelētheisa alla mallon eis to cheiron elthousa
akousasa peri tou iēsou elthousa en tō ochlō opisthen ēpsato tou imatiou autou
elegen gar oti kan tōn imatiōn autou apsōmai sōthēsomai
kai eutheōs exēranthē ē pēgē tou aimatos autēs kai egnō tō sōmati oti iatai apo tēs mastigos
kai eutheōs o iēsous epignous en eautō tēn ex autou dynamin exelthousan epistrapheis en tō ochlō elegen tis mou ēpsato tōn imatiōn
kai elegon autō oi mathētai autou blepeis ton ochlon synthlibonta se kai legeis tis mou ēpsato
kai perieblepeto idein tēn touto poiēsasan
ē de gynē phobētheisa kai tremousa eiduia o gegonen ep autē ēlthen kai prosepesen autō kai eipen autō pasan tēn alētheian
o de eipen autē thygater ē pistis sou sesōken se ypage eis eirēnēn kai isthi ygiēs apo tēs mastigos sou
eti autou lalountos erchontai apo tou archisynagōgou legontes oti ē thygatēr sou apethanen ti eti skylleis ton didaskalon
o de iēsous eutheōs akousas ton logon laloumenon legei tō archisynagōgō mē phobou monon pisteue
kai ouk aphēken oudena autō synakolouthēsai ei mē petron kai iakōbon kai iōannēn ton adelphon iakōbou
kai erchetai eis ton oikon tou archisynagōgou kai theōrei thorybon klaiontas kai alalazontas polla
kai eiselthōn legei autois ti thorybeisthe kai klaiete to paidion ouk apethanen alla katheudei
kai kategelōn autou o de ekbalōn apantas paralambanei ton patera tou paidiou kai tēn mētera kai tous met autou kai eisporeuetai opou ēn to paidion anakeimenon
kai kratēsas tēs cheiros tou paidiou legei autē talitha koumi o estin methermēneuomenon to korasion soi legō egeirai
kai eutheōs anestē to korasion kai periepatei ēn gar etōn dōdeka kai exestēsan ekstasei megalē
kai diesteilato autois polla ina mēdeis gnō touto kai eipen dothēnai autē phagein
kai exēlthen ekeithen kai ēlthen eis tēn patrida autou kai akolouthousin autō oi mathētai autou

kai genomenou sabbatou ērxato en tē synagōgē didaskein kai polloi akouontes exeplēssonto legontes pothen toutō tauta kai tis ē sophia ē dotheisa autō oti kai dynameis toiautai dia tōn cheirōn autou ginontai
ouch outos estin o tektōn o uios marias adelphos de iakōbou kai iōsē kai iouda kai simōnos kai ouk eisin ai adelphai autou ōde pros ēmas kai eskandalizonto en autō
elegen de autois o iēsous oti ouk estin prophētēs atimos ei mē en tē patridi autou kai en tois syngenesin kai en tē oikia autou
kai ouk ēdynato ekei oudemian dynamin poiēsai ei mē oligois arrōstois epitheis tas cheiras etherapeusen
kai ethaumazen dia tēn apistian autōn kai periēgen tas kōmas kyklō didaskōn
kai proskaleitai tous dōdeka kai ērxato autous apostellein dyo dyo kai edidou autois exousian tōn pneumatōn tōn akathartōn
kai parēngeilen autois ina mēden airōsin eis odon ei mē rabdon monon mē pēran mē arton mē eis tēn zōnēn chalkon
all ypodedemenous sandalia kai mē endysasthai dyo chitōnas
kai elegen autois opou ean eiselthēte eis oikian ekei menete eōs an exelthēte ekeithen

kai osoi an mē dexōntai ymas mēde akousōsin ymōn ekporeuomenoi ekeithen ektinaxate ton choun ton ypokatō tōn podōn ymōn eis martyrion autois amēn legō ymin anektoteron estai sodomois ē gomorrois en ēmera kriseōs ē tē polei ekeinē
kai exelthontes ekērysson ina metanoēsōsin
kai daimonia polla exeballon kai ēleiphon elaiō pollous arrōstous kai etherapeuon
kai ēkousen o basileus ērōdēs phaneron gar egeneto to onoma autou kai elegen oti iōannēs o baptizōn ek nekrōn ēgerthē kai dia touto energousin ai dynameis en autō
alloi elegon oti ēlias estin alloi de elegon oti prophētēs estin ē ōs eis tōn prophētōn
akousas de o ērōdēs eipen oti on egō apekephalisa iōannēn outos estin autos ēgerthē ek nekrōn
autos gar o ērōdēs aposteilas ekratēsen ton iōannēn kai edēsen auton en tē phylakē dia ērōdiada tēn gynaika philippou tou adelphou autou oti autēn egamēsen
elegen gar o iōannēs tō ērōdē oti ouk exestin soi echein tēn gynaika tou adelphou sou
ē de ērōdias eneichen autō kai ēthelen auton apokteinai kai ouk ēdynato
o gar ērōdēs ephobeito ton iōannēn eidōs auton andra dikaion kai agion kai synetērei auton kai akousas autou polla epoiei kai ēdeōs autou ēkouen
kai genomenēs ēmeras eukairou ote ērōdēs tois genesiois autou deipnon epoiei tois megistasin autou kai tois chiliarchois kai tois prōtois tēs galilaias
kai eiselthousēs tēs thygatros autēs tēs ērōdiados kai orchēsamenēs kai aresasēs tō ērōdē kai tois synanakeimenois eipen o basileus tō korasiō aitēson me o ean thelēs kai dōsō soi
kai ōmosen autē oti o ean me aitēsēs dōsō soi eōs ēmisous tēs basileias mou
ē de exelthousa eipen tē mētri autēs ti aitēsomai ē de eipen tēn kephalēn iōannou tou baptistou
kai eiselthousa eutheōs meta spoudēs pros ton basilea ētēsato legousa thelō ina moi dōs ex autēs epi pinaki tēn kephalēn iōannou tou baptistou
kai perilypos genomenos o basileus dia tous orkous kai tous synanakeimenous ouk ēthelēsen autēn athetēsai
kai eutheōs aposteilas o basileus spekoulatōra epetaxen enechthēnai tēn kephalēn autou
o de apelthōn apekephalisen auton en tē phylakē kai ēnenken tēn kephalēn autou epi pinaki kai edōken autēn tō korasiō kai to korasion edōken autēn tē mētri autēs
kai akousantes oi mathētai autou ēlthon kai ēran to ptōma autou kai ethēkan auto en mnēmeiō
kai synagontai oi apostoloi pros ton iēsoun kai apēngeilan autō panta kai osa epoiēsan kai osa edidaxan
kai eipen autois deute ymeis autoi kat idian eis erēmon topon kai anapauesthe oligon ēsan gar oi erchomenoi kai oi ypagontes polloi kai oude phagein ēukairoun
kai apēlthon eis erēmon topon tō ploiō kat idian
kai eidon autous ypagontas oi ochloi kai epegnōsan auton polloi kai pezē apo pasōn tōn poleōn synedramon ekei kai proēlthon autous kai synēlthon pros auton
kai exelthōn eiden o iēsous polyn ochlon kai esplanchnisthē ep autois oti ēsan ōs probata mē echonta poimena kai ērxato didaskein autous polla
kai ēdē ōras pollēs genomenēs proselthontes autō oi mathētai autou legousin oti erēmos estin o topos kai ēdē ōra pollē
apolyson autous ina apelthontes eis tous kyklō agrous kai kōmas agorasōsin eautois artous ti gar phagōsin ouk echousin
o de apokritheis eipen autois dote autois ymeis phagein kai legousin autō apelthontes agorasōmen diakosiōn dēnariōn artous kai dōmen autois phagein
o de legei autois posous artous echete ypagete kai idete kai gnontes legousin pente kai dyo ichthyas
kai epetaxen autois anaklinai pantas symposia symposia epi tō chlōrō chortō
kai anepeson prasiai prasiai ana ekaton kai ana pentēkonta

kai labōn tous pente artous kai tous dyo ichthyas anablepsas eis ton ouranon eulogēsen kai kateklasen tous artous kai edidou tois mathētais autou ina parathōsin autois kai tous dyo ichthyas emerisen pasin
kai ephagon pantes kai echortasthēsan
kai ēran klasmatōn dōdeka kophinous plēreis kai apo tōn ichthyōn
kai ēsan oi phagontes tous artous ōsei pentakischilioi andres
kai eutheōs ēnankasen tous mathētas autou embēnai eis to ploion kai proagein eis to peran pros bēthsaidan eōs autos apolysē ton ochlon
kai apotaxamenos autois apēlthen eis to oros proseuxasthai
kai opsias genomenēs ēn to ploion en mesō tēs thalassēs kai autos monos epi tēs gēs
kai eiden autous basanizomenous en tō elaunein ēn gar o anemos enantios autois kai peri tetartēn phylakēn tēs nyktos erchetai pros autous peripatōn epi tēs thalassēs kai ēthelen parelthein autous
oi de idontes auton peripatounta epi tēs thalassēs edoxan phantasma einai kai anekraxan
pantes gar auton eidon kai etarachthēsan kai eutheōs elalēsen met autōn kai legei autois tharseite egō eimi mē phobeisthe
kai anebē pros autous eis to ploion kai ekopasen o anemos kai lian ek perissou en eautois existanto kai ethaumazon
ou gar synēkan epi tois artois ēn gar ē kardia autōn pepōrōmenē
kai diaperasantes ēlthon epi tēn gēn genēsaret kai prosōrmisthēsan
kai exelthontōn autōn ek tou ploiou eutheōs epignontes auton
peridramontes olēn tēn perichōron ekeinēn ērxanto epi tois krabbatois tous kakōs echontas peripherein opou ēkouon oti ekei estin

kai opou an eiseporeueto eis kōmas ē poleis ē agrous en tais agorais etithoun tous asthenountas kai parekaloun auton ina kan tou kraspedou tou imatiou autou apsōntai kai osoi an ēptonto autou esōzonto
kai synagontai pros auton oi pharisaioi kai tines tōn grammateōn elthontes apo ierosolymōn
kai idontes tinas tōn mathētōn autou koinais chersin tout estin aniptois esthiontas artous emempsanto
oi gar pharisaioi kai pantes oi ioudaioi ean mē pygmē nipsōntai tas cheiras ouk esthiousin kratountes tēn paradosin tōn presbyterōn
kai apo agoras ean mē baptisōntai ouk esthiousin kai alla polla estin a parelabon kratein baptismous potēriōn kai xestōn kai chalkiōn kai klinōn
epeita eperōtōsin auton oi pharisaioi kai oi grammateis dia ti oi mathētai sou ou peripatousin kata tēn paradosin tōn presbyterōn alla aniptois chersin esthiousin ton arton
o de apokritheis eipen autois oti kalōs proephēteusen ēsaias peri ymōn tōn ypokritōn ōs gegraptai outos o laos tois cheilesin me tima ē de kardia autōn porrō apechei ap emou
matēn de sebontai me didaskontes didaskalias entalmata anthrōpōn
aphentes gar tēn entolēn tou theou krateite tēn paradosin tōn anthrōpōn baptismous xestōn kai potēriōn kai alla paromoia toiauta polla poieite
kai elegen autois kalōs atheteite tēn entolēn tou theou ina tēn paradosin ymōn tērēsēte
mōsēs gar eipen tima ton patera sou kai tēn mētera sou kai o kakologōn patera ē mētera thanatō teleutatō
ymeis de legete ean eipē anthrōpos tō patri ē tē mētri korban o estin dōron o ean ex emou ōphelēthēs
kai ouketi aphiete auton ouden poiēsai tō patri autou ē tē mētri autou
akyrountes ton logon tou theou tē paradosei ymōn ē paredōkate kai paromoia toiauta polla poieite
kai proskalesamenos panta ton ochlon elegen autois akouete mou pantes kai syniete
ouden estin exōthen tou anthrōpou eisporeuomenon eis auton o dynatai auton koinōsai alla ta ekporeuomena ap autou ekeina estin ta koinounta ton anthrōpon
ei tis echei ōta akouein akouetō
kai ote eisēlthen eis oikon apo tou ochlou epērōtōn auton oi mathētai autou peri tēs parabolēs
kai legei autois outōs kai ymeis asynetoi este ou noeite oti pan to exōthen eisporeuomenon eis ton anthrōpon ou dynatai auton koinōsai
oti ouk eisporeuetai autou eis tēn kardian all eis tēn koilian kai eis ton aphedrōna ekporeuetai katharizon panta ta brōmata
elegen de oti to ek tou anthrōpou ekporeuomenon ekeino koinoi ton anthrōpon
esōthen gar ek tēs kardias tōn anthrōpōn oi dialogismoi oi kakoi ekporeuontai moicheiai porneiai phonoi
klopai pleonexiai ponēriai dolos aselgeia ophthalmos ponēros blasphēmia yperēphania aphrosynē
panta tauta ta ponēra esōthen ekporeuetai kai koinoi ton anthrōpon
kai ekeithen anastas apēlthen eis ta methoria tyrou kai sidōnos kai eiselthōn eis tēn oikian oudena ēthelen gnōnai kai ouk ēdynēthē lathein
akousasa gar gynē peri autou ēs eichen to thygatrion autēs pneuma akatharton elthousa prosepesen pros tous podas autou
ēn de ē gynē ellēnis syrophoinissa tō genei kai ērōta auton ina to daimonion ekballē ek tēs thygatros autēs
o de iēsous eipen autē aphes prōton chortasthēnai ta tekna ou gar kalon estin labein ton arton tōn teknōn kai balein tois kynariois
ē de apekrithē kai legei autō nai kyrie kai gar ta kynaria ypokatō tēs trapezēs esthiei apo tōn psichiōn tōn paidiōn
kai eipen autē dia touton ton logon ypage exelēlythen to daimonion ek tēs thygatros sou
kai apelthousa eis ton oikon autēs euren to daimonion exelēlythos kai tēn thygatera beblēmenēn epi tēs klinēs
kai palin exelthōn ek tōn oriōn tyrou kai sidōnos ēlthen pros tēn thalassan tēs galilaias ana meson tōn oriōn dekapoleōs
kai pherousin autō kōphon mogilalon kai parakalousin auton ina epithē autō tēn cheira
kai apolabomenos auton apo tou ochlou kat idian ebalen tous daktylous autou eis ta ōta autou kai ptysas ēpsato tēs glōssēs autou
kai anablepsas eis ton ouranon estenaxen kai legei autō ephphatha o estin dianoichthēti
kai eutheōs diēnoichthēsan autou ai akoai kai elythē o desmos tēs glōssēs autou kai elalei orthōs
kai diesteilato autois ina mēdeni eipōsin oson de autos autois diestelleto mallon perissoteron ekērysson
kai yperperissōs exeplēssonto legontes kalōs panta pepoiēken kai tous kōphous poiei akouein kai tous alalous lalein
en ekeinais tais ēmerais pampollou ochlou ontos kai mē echontōn ti phagōsin proskalesamenos o iēsous tous mathētas autou legei autois
splanchnizomai epi ton ochlon oti ēdē ēmeras treis prosmenousin moi kai ouk echousin ti phagōsin
kai ean apolysō autous nēsteis eis oikon autōn eklythēsontai en tē odō tines gar autōn makrothen ēkousin
kai apekrithēsan autō oi mathētai autou pothen toutous dynēsetai tis ōde chortasai artōn ep erēmias
kai epērōta autous posous echete artous oi de eipon epta
kai parēngeilen tō ochlō anapesein epi tēs gēs kai labōn tous epta artous eucharistēsas eklasen kai edidou tois mathētais autou ina parathōsin kai parethēkan tō ochlō
kai eichon ichthydia oliga kai eulogēsas eipen paratheinai kai auta
ephagon de kai echortasthēsan kai ēran perisseumata klasmatōn epta spyridas
ēsan de oi phagontes ōs tetrakischilioi kai apelysen autous
kai eutheōs embas eis to ploion meta tōn mathētōn autou ēlthen eis ta merē dalmanoutha
kai exēlthon oi pharisaioi kai ērxanto syzētein autō zētountes par autou sēmeion apo tou ouranou peirazontes auton
kai anastenaxas tō pneumati autou legei ti ē genea autē sēmeion epizētei amēn legō ymin ei dothēsetai tē genea tautē sēmeion
kai apheis autous embas palin eis to ploion apēlthen eis to peran
kai epelathonto labein artous kai ei mē ena arton ouk eichon meth eautōn en tō ploiō
kai diestelleto autois legōn orate blepete apo tēs zymēs tōn pharisaiōn kai tēs zymēs ērōdou
kai dielogizonto pros allēlous legontes oti artous ouk echomen
kai gnous o iēsous legei autois ti dialogizesthe oti artous ouk echete oupō noeite oude syniete eti pepōrōmenēn echete tēn kardian ymōn
ophthalmous echontes ou blepete kai ōta echontes ouk akouete kai ou mnēmoneuete
ote tous pente artous eklasa eis tous pentakischilious posous kophinous plēreis klasmatōn ērate legousin autō dōdeka
ote de tous epta eis tous tetrakischilious posōn spyridōn plērōmata klasmatōn ērate oi de eipon epta
kai elegen autois pōs ou syniete
kai erchetai eis bēthsaidan kai pherousin autō typhlon kai parakalousin auton ina autou apsētai
kai epilabomenos tēs cheiros tou typhlou exēgagen auton exō tēs kōmēs kai ptysas eis ta ommata autou epitheis tas cheiras autō epērōta auton ei ti blepei
kai anablepsas elegen blepō tous anthrōpous oti ōs dendra orō peripatountas
eita palin epethēken tas cheiras epi tous ophthalmous autou kai epoiēsen auton anablepsai kai apokatestathē kai eneblepsen tēlaugōs apantas
kai apesteilen auton eis ton oikon autou legōn mēde eis tēn kōmēn eiselthēs mēde eipēs tini en tē kōmē
kai exēlthen o iēsous kai o mathētai autou eis tas kōmas kaisareias tēs philippou kai en tē odō epērōta tous mathētas autou legōn autois tina me legousin oi anthrōpoi einai
oi de apekrithēsan iōannēn ton baptistēn kai alloi ēlian alloi de ena tōn prophētōn
kai autos legei autois ymeis de tina me legete einai apokritheis de o petros legei autō sy ei o christos
kai epetimēsen autois ina mēdeni legōsin peri autou
kai ērxato didaskein autous oti dei ton uion tou anthrōpou polla pathein kai apodokimasthēnai apo tōn presbyterōn kai archiereōn kai grammateōn kai apoktanthēnai kai meta treis ēmeras anastēnai
kai parrēsia ton logon elalei kai proslabomenos auton o petros ērxato epitiman autō
o de epistrapheis kai idōn tous mathētas autou epetimēsen tō petrō legōn ypage opisō mou satana oti ou phroneis ta tou theou alla ta tōn anthrōpōn
kai proskalesamenos ton ochlon syn tois mathētais autou eipen autois ostis thelei opisō mou elthein aparnēsasthō eauton kai aratō ton stauron autou kai akoloutheitō moi
os gar an thelē tēn psychēn autou sōsai apolesei autēn os d an apolesē tēn psychēn autou eneken emou kai tou euangeliou outos sōsei autēn
ti gar ōphelēsei anthrōpon ean kerdēsē ton kosmon olon kai zēmiōthē tēn psychēn autou
ē ti dōsei anthrōpos antallagma tēs psychēs autou

os gar an epaischynthē me kai tous emous logous en tē genea tautē tē moichalidi kai amartōlō kai o uios tou anthrōpou epaischynthēsetai auton otan elthē en tē doxē tou patros autou meta tōn angelōn tōn agiōn
kai elegen autois amēn legō ymin oti eisin tines tōn ōde estēkotōn oitines ou mē geusōntai thanatou eōs an idōsin tēn basileian tou theou elēlythuian en dynamei
kai meth ēmeras ex paralambanei o iēsous ton petron kai ton iakōbon kai ton iōannēn kai anapherei autous eis oros ypsēlon kat idian monous kai metemorphōthē emprosthen autōn
kai ta imatia autou egeneto stilbonta leuka lian ōs chiōn oia gnapheus epi tēs gēs ou dynatai leukanai
kai ōphthē autois ēlias syn mōsei kai ēsan syllalountes tō iēsou
kai apokritheis o petros legei tō iēsou rabbi kalon estin ēmas ōde einai kai poiēsōmen skēnas treis soi mian kai mōsei mian kai ēlia mian
ou gar ēdei ti lalēsē ēsan gar ekphoboi
kai egeneto nephelē episkiazousa autois kai ēlthen phōnē ek tēs nephelēs legousa outos estin o uios mou o agapētos autou akouete
kai exapina periblepsamenoi ouketi oudena eidon alla ton iēsoun monon meth eautōn
katabainontōn de autōn apo tou orous diesteilato autois ina mēdeni diēgēsōntai a eidon ei mē otan o uios tou anthrōpou ek nekrōn anastē
kai ton logon ekratēsan pros eautous syzētountes ti estin to ek nekrōn anastēnai
kai epērōtōn auton legontes oti legousin oi grammateis oti ēlian dei elthein prōton
o de apokritheis eipen autois ēlias men elthōn prōton apokathista panta kai pōs gegraptai epi ton uion tou anthrōpou ina polla pathē kai exoudenōthē
alla legō ymin oti kai ēlias elēlythen kai epoiēsan autō osa ēthelēsan kathōs gegraptai ep auton
kai elthōn pros tous mathētas eiden ochlon polyn peri autous kai grammateis syzētountas autois
kai eutheōs pas o ochlos idōn auton exethambēthē kai prostrechontes ēspazonto auton
kai epērōtēsen tous grammateis ti syzēteite pros autous
kai apokritheis eis ek tou ochlou eipen didaskale ēnenka ton uion mou pros se echonta pneuma alalon
kai opou an auton katalabē rēssei auton kai aphrizei kai trizei tous odontas autou kai xērainetai kai eipon tois mathētais sou ina auto ekbalōsin kai ouk ischysan
o de apokritheis autō legei ō genea apistos eōs pote pros ymas esomai eōs pote anexomai ymōn pherete auton pros me
kai ēnenkan auton pros auton kai idōn auton eutheōs to pneuma esparaxen auton kai pesōn epi tēs gēs ekylieto aphrizōn
kai epērōtēsen ton patera autou posos chronos estin ōs touto gegonen autō o de eipen paidiothen
kai pollakis auton kai eis pyr ebalen kai eis ydata ina apolesē auton all ei ti dynasai boēthēson ēmin splanchnistheis eph ēmas
o de iēsous eipen autō to ei dynasai pisteusai panta dynata tō pisteuonti
kai eutheōs kraxas o patēr tou paidiou meta dakryōn elegen pisteuō kyrie boēthei mou tē apistia
idōn de o iēsous oti episyntrechei ochlos epetimēsen tō pneumati tō akathartō legōn autō to pneuma to alalon kai kōphon egō soi epitassō exelthe ex autou kai mēketi eiselthēs eis auton
kai kraxan kai polla sparaxan auton exēlthen kai egeneto ōsei nekros ōste pollous legein oti apethanen
o de iēsous kratēsas auton tēs cheiros ēgeiren auton kai anestē
kai eiselthonta auton eis oikon oi mathētai autou epērōtōn auton kat idian oti ēmeis ouk ēdynēthēmen ekbalein auto
kai eipen autois touto to genos en oudeni dynatai exelthein ei mē en proseuchē kai nēsteia
kai ekeithen exelthontes pareporeuonto dia tēs galilaias kai ouk ēthelen ina tis gnō
edidasken gar tous mathētas autou kai elegen autois oti o uios tou anthrōpou paradidotai eis cheiras anthrōpōn kai apoktenousin auton kai apoktantheis tē tritē ēmera anastēsetai
oi de ēgnooun to rēma kai ephobounto auton eperōtēsai
kai ēlthen eis kapernaoum kai en tē oikia genomenos epērōta autous ti en tē odō pros eautous dielogizesthe
oi de esiōpōn pros allēlous gar dielechthēsan en tē odō tis meizōn
kai kathisas ephōnēsen tous dōdeka kai legei autois ei tis thelei prōtos einai estai pantōn eschatos kai pantōn diakonos
kai labōn paidion estēsen auto en mesō autōn kai enankalisamenos auto eipen autois
os ean en tōn toioutōn paidiōn dexētai epi tō onomati mou eme dechetai kai os ean eme dexētai ouk eme dechetai alla ton aposteilanta me
apekrithē de autō o iōannēs legōn didaskale eidomen tina en tō onomati sou ekballonta daimonia os ouk akolouthei ēmin kai ekōlysamen auton oti ouk akolouthei ēmin
o de iēsous eipen mē kōlyete auton oudeis gar estin os poiēsei dynamin epi tō onomati mou kai dynēsetai tachy kakologēsai me
os gar ouk estin kath ēmōn yper ēmōn estin
os gar an potisē ymas potērion ydatos en tō onomati mou oti christou este amēn legō ymin ou mē apolesē ton misthon autou
kai os an skandalisē ena tōn mikrōn tōn pisteuontōn eis eme kalon estin autō mallon ei perikeitai lithos mylikos peri ton trachēlon autou kai beblētai eis tēn thalassan
kai ean skandalizē se ē cheir sou apokopson autēn kalon soi estin kyllon eis tēn zōēn eiselthein ē tas dyo cheiras echonta apelthein eis tēn geennan eis to pyr to asbeston
opou o skōlēx autōn ou teleuta kai to pyr ou sbennytai
kai ean o pous sou skandalizē se apokopson auton kalon estin soi eiselthein eis tēn zōēn chōlon ē tous dyo podas echonta blēthēnai eis tēn geennan eis to pyr to asbeston
opou o skōlēx autōn ou teleuta kai to pyr ou sbennytai
kai ean o ophthalmos sou skandalizē se ekbale auton kalon soi estin monophthalmon eiselthein eis tēn basileian tou theou ē dyo ophthalmous echonta blēthēnai eis tēn geennan tou pyros
opou o skōlēx autōn ou teleuta kai to pyr ou sbennytai
pas gar pyri alisthēsetai kai pasa thysia ali alisthēsetai
kalon to alas ean de to alas analon genētai en tini auto artysete echete en eautois alas kai eirēneuete en allēlois
kakeithen anastas erchetai eis ta oria tēs ioudaias dia tou peran tou iordanou kai symporeuontai palin ochloi pros auton kai ōs eiōthei palin edidasken autous
kai proselthontes oi pharisaioi epērōtēsan auton ei exestin andri gynaika apolysai peirazontes auton
o de apokritheis eipen autois ti ymin eneteilato mōsēs
oi de eipon mōsēs epetrepsen biblion apostasiou grapsai kai apolysai
kai apokritheis o iēsous eipen autois pros tēn sklērokardian ymōn egrapsen ymin tēn entolēn tautēn
apo de archēs ktiseōs arsen kai thēly epoiēsen autous o theos
eneken toutou kataleipsei anthrōpos ton patera autou kai tēn mētera kai proskollēthēsetai pros tēn gynaika autou
kai esontai oi dyo eis sarka mian ōste ouketi eisin dyo alla mia sarx
o oun o theos synezeuxen anthrōpos mē chōrizetō
kai en tē oikia palin oi mathētai autou peri tou autou epērōtēsan auton
kai legei autois os ean apolysē tēn gynaika autou kai gamēsē allēn moichatai ep autēn
kai ean gynē apolysē ton andra autēs kai gamēthē allō moichatai
kai prosepheron autō paidia ina apsētai autōn oi de mathētai epetimōn tois prospherousin
idōn de o iēsous ēganaktēsen kai eipen autois aphete ta paidia erchesthai pros me kai mē kōlyete auta tōn gar toioutōn estin ē basileia tou theou
amēn legō ymin os ean mē dexētai tēn basileian tou theou ōs paidion ou mē eiselthē eis autēn
kai enankalisamenos auta titheis tas cheiras ep auta ēulogei auta
kai ekporeuomenou autou eis odon prosdramōn eis kai gonypetēsas auton epērōta auton didaskale agathe ti poiēsō ina zōēn aiōnion klēronomēsō
o de iēsous eipen autō ti me legeis agathon oudeis agathos ei mē eis o theos
tas entolas oidas mē moicheusēs mē phoneusēs mē klepsēs mē pseudomartyrēsēs mē aposterēsēs tima ton patera sou kai tēn mētera
o de apokritheis eipen autō didaskale tauta panta ephylaxamēn ek neotētos mou
o de iēsous emblepsas autō ēgapēsen auton kai eipen autō en soi ysterei ypage osa echeis pōlēson kai dos tois ptōchois kai exeis thēsauron en ouranō kai deuro akolouthei moi aras ton stauron
o de stygnasas epi tō logō apēlthen lypoumenos ēn gar echōn ktēmata polla
kai periblepsamenos o iēsous legei tois mathētais autou pōs dyskolōs oi ta chrēmata echontes eis tēn basileian tou theou eiseleusontai
oi de mathētai ethambounto epi tois logois autou o de iēsous palin apokritheis legei autois tekna pōs dyskolon estin tous pepoithotas epi tois chrēmasin eis tēn basileian tou theou eiselthein
eukopōteron estin kamēlon dia tēs trymalias tēs raphidos dielthein ē plousion eis tēn basileian tou theou eiselthein
oi de perissōs exeplēssonto legontes pros eautous kai tis dynatai sōthēnai
emblepsas de autois o iēsous legei para anthrōpois adynaton all ou para tō theō panta gar dynata estin para tō theō
kai ērxato o petros legein autō idou ēmeis aphēkamen panta kai ēkolouthēsamen soi
apokritheis de o iēsous eipen amēn legō ymin oudeis estin os aphēken oikian ē adelphous ē adelphas ē patera ē mētera ē gynaika ē tekna ē agrous eneken emou kai tou euangeliou
ean mē labē ekatontaplasiona nyn en tō kairō toutō oikias kai adelphous kai adelphas kai mēteras kai tekna kai agrous meta diōgmōn kai en tō aiōni tō erchomenō zōēn aiōnion
polloi de esontai prōtoi eschatoi kai oi eschatoi prōtoi

ēsan de en tē odō anabainontes eis ierosolyma kai ēn proagōn autous o iēsous kai ethambounto kai akolouthountes ephobounto kai paralabōn palin tous dōdeka ērxato autois legein ta mellonta autō symbainein
oti idou anabainomen eis ierosolyma kai o uios tou anthrōpou paradothēsetai tois archiereusin kai tois grammateusin kai katakrinousin auton thanatō kai paradōsousin auton tois ethnesin
kai empaixousin autō kai mastigōsousin auton kai emptysousin autō kai apoktenousin auton kai tē tritē ēmera anastēsetai
kai prosporeuontai autō iakōbos kai iōannēs oi uioi zebedaiou legontes didaskale thelomen ina o ean aitēsōmen poiēsēs ēmin
o de eipen autois ti thelete poiēsai me ymin
oi de eipon autō dos ēmin ina eis ek dexiōn sou kai eis ex euōnymōn sou kathisōmen en tē doxē sou
o de iēsous eipen autois ouk oidate ti aiteisthe dynasthe piein to potērion o egō pinō kai to baptisma o egō baptizomai baptisthēnai
oi de eipon autō dynametha o de iēsous eipen autois to men potērion o egō pinō piesthe kai to baptisma o egō baptizomai baptisthēsesthe
to de kathisai ek dexiōn mou kai ex euōnymōn mou ouk estin emon dounai all ois ētoimastai
kai akousantes oi deka ērxanto aganaktein peri iakōbou kai iōannou
o de iēsous proskalesamenos autous legei autois oidate oti oi dokountes archein tōn ethnōn katakyrieuousin autōn kai oi megaloi autōn katexousiazousin autōn
ouch outōs de estai en ymin all os ean thelē genesthai megas en ymin estai diakonos ymōn
kai os an thelē ymōn genesthai prōtos estai pantōn doulos
kai gar o uios tou anthrōpou ouk ēlthen diakonēthēnai alla diakonēsai kai dounai tēn psychēn autou lytron anti pollōn
kai erchontai eis ierichō kai ekporeuomenou autou apo ierichō kai tōn mathētōn autou kai ochlou ikanou uios timaiou bartimaios o typhlos ekathēto para tēn odon prosaitōn
kai akousas oti iēsous o nazōraios estin ērxato krazein kai legein o uios dabid iēsou eleēson me
kai epetimōn autō polloi ina siōpēsē o de pollō mallon ekrazen uie dabid eleēson me
kai stas o iēsous eipen auton phōnēthēnai kai phōnousin ton typhlon legontes autō tharsei egeirai phōnei se
o de apobalōn to imation autou anastas ēlthen pros ton iēsoun
kai apokritheis legei autō o iēsous ti theleis poiēsō soi o de typhlos eipen autō rabboni ina anablepsō
o de iēsous eipen autō ypage ē pistis sou sesōken se kai eutheōs aneblepsen kai ēkolouthei tō iēsou en tē odō
kai ote engizousin eis ierousalēm eis bēthphagē kai bēthanian pros to oros tōn elaiōn apostellei dyo tōn mathētōn autou
kai legei autois ypagete eis tēn kōmēn tēn katenanti ymōn kai eutheōs eisporeuomenoi eis autēn eurēsete pōlon dedemenon eph on oudeis anthrōpōn kekathiken lysantes auton agagete
kai ean tis ymin eipē ti poieite touto eipate oti o kyrios autou chreian echei kai eutheōs auton apostelei ōde
apēlthon de kai euron ton pōlon dedemenon pros tēn thyran exō epi tou amphodou kai lyousin auton
kai tines tōn ekei estēkotōn elegon autois ti poieite lyontes ton pōlon
oi de eipon autois kathōs eneteilato o iēsous kai aphēkan autous
kai ēgagon ton pōlon pros ton iēsoun kai epebalon autō ta imatia autōn kai ekathisen ep autō
polloi de ta imatia autōn estrōsan eis tēn odon alloi de stoibadas ekopton ek tōn dendrōn kai estrōnnyon eis tēn odon
kai oi proagontes kai oi akolouthountes ekrazon legontes ōsanna eulogēmenos o erchomenos en onomati kyriou
eulogēmenē ē erchomenē basileia en onomati kyriou tou patros ēmōn dabid ōsanna en tois ypsistois
kai eisēlthen eis ierosolyma o iēsous kai eis to ieron kai periblepsamenos panta opsias ēdē ousēs tēs ōras exēlthen eis bēthanian meta tōn dōdeka
kai tē epaurion exelthontōn autōn apo bēthanias epeinasen
kai idōn sykēn makrothen echousan phylla ēlthen ei ara eurēsei ti en autē kai elthōn ep autēn ouden euren ei mē phylla ou gar ēn kairos sykōn
kai apokritheis o iēsous eipen autē mēketi ek sou eis ton aiōna oudeis karpon phagoi kai ēkouon oi mathētai autou

kai erchontai eis ierosolyma kai eiselthōn o iēsous eis to ieron ērxato ekballein tous pōlountas kai agorazontas en tō ierō kai tas trapezas tōn kollybistōn kai tas kathedras tōn pōlountōn tas peristeras katestrepsen
kai ouk ēphien ina tis dienenkē skeuos dia tou ierou
kai edidasken legōn autois ou gegraptai oti o oikos mou oikos proseuchēs klēthēsetai pasin tois ethnesin ymeis de epoiēsate auton spēlaion lēstōn
kai ēkousan oi grammateis kai oi archiereis kai ezētoun pōs auton apolesousin ephobounto gar auton oti pas o ochlos exeplēsseto epi tē didachē autou
kai ote opse egeneto exeporeueto exō tēs poleōs
kai prōi paraporeuomenoi eidon tēn sykēn exērammenēn ek rizōn
kai anamnēstheis o petros legei autō rabbi ide ē sykē ēn katērasō exērantai
kai apokritheis iēsous legei autois echete pistin theou
amēn gar legō ymin oti os an eipē tō orei toutō arthēti kai blēthēti eis tēn thalassan kai mē diakrithē en tē kardia autou alla pisteusē oti a legei ginetai estai autō o ean eipē
dia touto legō ymin panta osa an proseuchomenoi aiteisthe pisteuete oti lambanete kai estai ymin
kai otan stēkēte proseuchomenoi aphiete ei ti echete kata tinos ina kai o patēr ymōn o en tois ouranois aphē ymin ta paraptōmata ymōn
ei de ymeis ouk aphiete oude o patēr ymōn o en tois ouranois aphēsei ta paraptōmata ymōn
kai erchontai palin eis ierosolyma kai en tō ierō peripatountos autou erchontai pros auton oi archiereis kai oi grammateis kai oi presbyteroi
kai legousin autō en poia exousia tauta poieis kai tis soi tēn exousian tautēn edōken ina tauta poiēs
o de iēsous apokritheis eipen autois eperōtēsō ymas kagō ena logon kai apokrithēte moi kai erō ymin en poia exousia tauta poiō
to baptisma iōannou ex ouranou ēn ē ex anthrōpōn apokrithēte moi
kai elogizonto pros eautous legontes ean eipōmen ex ouranou erei dia ti oun ouk episteusate autō
all ean eipōmen ex anthrōpōn ephobounto ton laon apantes gar eichon ton iōannēn oti ontōs prophētēs ēn
kai apokrithentes legousin tō iēsou ouk oidamen kai o iēsous apokritheis legei autois oude egō legō ymin en poia exousia tauta poiō
kai ērxato autois en parabolais legein ampelōna ephyteusen anthrōpos kai periethēken phragmon kai ōryxen ypolēnion kai ōkodomēsen pyrgon kai exedoto auton geōrgois kai apedēmēsen
kai apesteilen pros tous geōrgous tō kairō doulon ina para tōn geōrgōn labē apo tou karpou tou ampelōnos
oi de labontes auton edeiran kai apesteilan kenon
kai palin apesteilen pros autous allon doulon kakeinon lithobolēsantes ekephalaiōsan kai apesteilan ētimōmenon
kai palin allon apesteilen kakeinon apekteinan kai pollous allous tous men derontes tous de apokteinontes
eti oun ena uion echōn agapēton autou apesteilen kai auton pros autous eschaton legōn oti entrapēsontai ton uion mou
ekeinoi de oi geōrgoi eipon pros eautous oti outos estin o klēronomos deute apokteinōmen auton kai ēmōn estai ē klēronomia
kai labontes auton apekteinan kai exebalon exō tou ampelōnos
ti oun poiēsei o kyrios tou ampelōnos eleusetai kai apolesei tous geōrgous kai dōsei ton ampelōna allois
oude tēn graphēn tautēn anegnōte lithon on apedokimasan oi oikodomountes outos egenēthē eis kephalēn gōnias
para kyriou egeneto autē kai estin thaumastē en ophthalmois ēmōn
kai ezētoun auton kratēsai kai ephobēthēsan ton ochlon egnōsan gar oti pros autous tēn parabolēn eipen kai aphentes auton apēlthon
kai apostellousin pros auton tinas tōn pharisaiōn kai tōn ērōdianōn ina auton agreusōsin logō

oi de elthontes legousin autō didaskale oidamen oti alēthēs ei kai ou melei soi peri oudenos ou gar blepeis eis prosōpon anthrōpōn all ep alētheias tēn odon tou theou didaskeis exestin kēnson kaisari dounai ē ou
dōmen ē mē dōmen o de eidōs autōn tēn ypokrisin eipen autois ti me peirazete pherete moi dēnarion ina idō
oi de ēnenkan kai legei autois tinos ē eikōn autē kai ē epigraphē oi de eipon autō kaisaros
kai apokritheis o iēsous eipen autois apodote ta kaisaros kaisari kai ta tou theou tō theō kai ethaumasan ep autō
kai erchontai saddoukaioi pros auton oitines legousin anastasin mē einai kai epērōtēsan auton legontes
didaskale mōsēs egrapsen ēmin oti ean tinos adelphos apothanē kai katalipē gynaika kai tekna mē aphē ina labē o adelphos autou tēn gynaika autou kai exanastēsē sperma tō adelphō autou
epta oun adelphoi ēsan kai o prōtos elaben gynaika kai apothnēskōn ouk aphēken sperma
kai o deuteros elaben autēn kai apethanen kai oude autos aphēken sperma kai o tritos ōsautōs
kai elabon autēn oi epta kai ouk aphēkan sperma eschatē pantōn apethanen kai ē gynē
en tē oun anastasei otan anastōsin tinos autōn estai gynē oi gar epta eschon autēn gynaika
kai apokritheis o iēsous eipen autois ou dia touto planasthe mē eidotes tas graphas mēde tēn dynamin tou theou
otan gar ek nekrōn anastōsin oute gamousin oute gamiskontai all eisin ōs angeloi oi en tois ouranois
peri de tōn nekrōn oti egeirontai ouk anegnōte en tē biblō mōseōs epi tēs batou ōs eipen autō o theos legōn egō o theos abraam kai o theos isaak kai o theos iakōb
ouk estin o theos nekrōn alla theos zōntōn ymeis oun poly planasthe
kai proselthōn eis tōn grammateōn akousas autōn syzētountōn eidōs oti kalōs autois apekrithē epērōtēsen auton poia estin prōtē pasōn entolē
o de iēsous apekrithē autō oti prōtē pasōn tōn entolōn akoue israēl kyrios o theos ēmōn kyrios eis estin
kai agapēseis kyrion ton theon sou ex olēs tēs kardias sou kai ex olēs tēs psychēs sou kai ex olēs tēs dianoias sou kai ex olēs tēs ischyos sou autē prōtē entolē
kai deutera omoia autē agapēseis ton plēsion sou ōs seauton meizōn toutōn allē entolē ouk estin
kai eipen autō o grammateus kalōs didaskale ep alētheias eipas oti eis estin theos kai ouk estin allos plēn autou

kai to agapan auton ex olēs tēs kardias kai ex olēs tēs syneseōs kai ex olēs tēs psychēs kai ex olēs tēs ischyos kai to agapan ton plēsion ōs eauton pleion estin pantōn tōn olokautōmatōn kai tōn thysiōn
kai o iēsous idōn auton oti nounechōs apekrithē eipen autō ou makran ei apo tēs basileias tou theou kai oudeis ouketi etolma auton eperōtēsai
kai apokritheis o iēsous elegen didaskōn en tō ierō pōs legousin oi grammateis oti o christos uios estin dabid
autos gar dabid eipen en tō pneumati tō agiō eipen o kyrios tō kyriō mou kathou ek dexiōn mou eōs an thō tous echthrous sou ypopodion tōn podōn sou
autos oun dabid legei auton kyrion kai pothen uios autou estin kai o polys ochlos ēkouen autou ēdeōs
kai elegen autois en tē didachē autou blepete apo tōn grammateōn tōn thelontōn en stolais peripatein kai aspasmous en tais agorais
kai prōtokathedrias en tais synagōgais kai prōtoklisias en tois deipnois
oi katesthiontes tas oikias tōn chērōn kai prophasei makra proseuchomenoi outoi lēpsontai perissoteron krima
kai kathisas o iēsous katenanti tou gazophylakiou etheōrei pōs o ochlos ballei chalkon eis to gazophylakion kai polloi plousioi eballon polla
kai elthousa mia chēra ptōchē ebalen lepta dyo o estin kodrantēs
kai proskalesamenos tous mathētas autou legei autois amēn legō ymin oti ē chēra autē ē ptōchē pleion pantōn beblēken tōn balontōn eis to gazophylakion
pantes gar ek tou perisseuontos autois ebalon autē de ek tēs ysterēseōs autēs panta osa eichen ebalen olon ton bion autēs
kai ekporeuomenou autou ek tou ierou legei autō eis tōn mathētōn autou didaskale ide potapoi lithoi kai potapai oikodomai
kai o iēsous apokritheis eipen autō blepeis tautas tas megalas oikodomas ou mē aphethē lithos epi lithō os ou mē katalythē
kai kathēmenou autou eis to oros tōn elaiōn katenanti tou ierou epērōtōn auton kat idian petros kai iakōbos kai iōannēs kai andreas
eipe ēmin pote tauta estai kai ti to sēmeion otan mellē panta tauta synteleisthai
o de iēsous apokritheis autois ērxato legein blepete mē tis ymas planēsē
polloi gar eleusontai epi tō onomati mou legontes oti egō eimi kai pollous planēsousin
otan de akousēte polemous kai akoas polemōn mē throeisthe dei gar genesthai all oupō to telos
egerthēsetai gar ethnos epi ethnos kai basileia epi basileian kai esontai seismoi kata topous kai esontai limoi kai tarachai archai ōdinōn tauta
blepete de ymeis eautous paradōsousin gar ymas eis synedria kai eis synagōgas darēsesthe kai epi ēgemonōn kai basileōn stathēsesthe eneken emou eis martyrion autois
kai eis panta ta ethnē dei prōton kērychthēnai to euangelion
otan de agagōsin ymas paradidontes mē promerimnate ti lalēsēte mēde meletate all o ean dothē ymin en ekeinē tē ōra touto laleite ou gar este ymeis oi lalountes alla to pneuma to agion
paradōsei de adelphos adelphon eis thanaton kai patēr teknon kai epanastēsontai tekna epi goneis kai thanatōsousin autous
kai esesthe misoumenoi ypo pantōn dia to onoma mou o de ypomeinas eis telos outos sōthēsetai
otan de idēte to bdelygma tēs erēmōseōs to rēthen ypo daniēl tou prophētou estōs opou ou dei o anaginōskōn noeitō tote oi en tē ioudaia pheugetōsan eis ta orē
o de epi tou dōmatos mē katabatō eis tēn oikian mēde eiselthetō arai ti ek tēs oikias autou
kai o eis ton agron ōn mē epistrepsatō eis ta opisō arai to imation autou
ouai de tais en gastri echousais kai tais thēlazousais en ekeinais tais ēmerais
proseuchesthe de ina mē genētai ē phygē ymōn cheimōnos
esontai gar ai ēmerai ekeinai thlipsis oia ou gegonen toiautē ap archēs ktiseōs ēs ektisen o theos eōs tou nyn kai ou mē genētai
kai ei mē kyrios ekolobōsen tas ēmeras ouk an esōthē pasa sarx alla dia tous eklektous ous exelexato ekolobōsen tas ēmeras
kai tote ean tis ymin eipē idou ōde o christos ē idou ekei mē pisteusēte
egerthēsontai gar pseudochristoi kai pseudoprophētai kai dōsousin sēmeia kai terata pros to apoplanan ei dynaton kai tous eklektous
ymeis de blepete idou proeirēka ymin panta
all en ekeinais tais ēmerais meta tēn thlipsin ekeinēn o ēlios skotisthēsetai kai ē selēnē ou dōsei to phengos autēs
kai oi asteres tou ouranou esontai ekpiptontes kai ai dynameis ai en tois ouranois saleuthēsontai
kai tote opsontai ton uion tou anthrōpou erchomenon en nephelais meta dynameōs pollēs kai doxēs
kai tote apostelei tous angelous autou kai episynaxei tous eklektous autou ek tōn tessarōn anemōn ap akrou gēs eōs akrou ouranou
apo de tēs sykēs mathete tēn parabolēn otan autēs ēdē o klados apalos genētai kai ekphyē ta phylla ginōskete oti engys to theros estin
outōs kai ymeis otan tauta idēte ginomena ginōskete oti engys estin epi thyrais
amēn legō ymin oti ou mē parelthē ē genea autē mechris ou panta tauta genētai
o ouranos kai ē gē pareleusontai oi de logoi mou ou mē parelthōsin
peri de tēs ēmeras ekeinēs kai tēs ōras oudeis oiden oude oi angeloi oi en ouranō oude o uios ei mē o patēr
blepete agrypneite kai proseuchesthe ouk oidate gar pote o kairos estin
ōs anthrōpos apodēmos apheis tēn oikian autou kai dous tois doulois autou tēn exousian kai ekastō to ergon autou kai tō thyrōrō eneteilato ina grēgorē
grēgoreite oun ouk oidate gar pote o kyrios tēs oikias erchetai opse ē mesonyktiou ē alektorophōnias ē prōi
mē elthōn exaiphnēs eurē ymas katheudontas
a de ymin legō pasin legō grēgoreite
ēn de to pascha kai ta azyma meta dyo ēmeras kai ezētoun oi archiereis kai oi grammateis pōs auton en dolō kratēsantes apokteinōsin
elegon de mē en tē eortē mēpote thorybos estai tou laou

kai ontos autou en bēthania en tē oikia simōnos tou leprou katakeimenou autou ēlthen gynē echousa alabastron myrou nardou pistikēs polytelous kai syntripsasa to alabastron katecheen autou kata tēs kephalēs
ēsan de tines aganaktountes pros eautous kai legontes eis ti ē apōleia autē tou myrou gegonen
ēdynato gar touto prathēnai epanō triakosiōn dēnariōn kai dothēnai tois ptōchois kai enebrimōnto autē
o de iēsous eipen aphete autēn ti autē kopous parechete kalon ergon eirgasato eis eme
pantote gar tous ptōchous echete meth eautōn kai otan thelēte dynasthe autous eu poiēsai eme de ou pantote echete
o eichen autē epoiēsen proelaben myrisai mou to sōma eis ton entaphiasmon
amēn legō ymin opou an kērychthē to euangelion touto eis olon ton kosmon kai o epoiēsen autē lalēthēsetai eis mnēmosynon autēs
kai o ioudas o iskariōtēs eis tōn dōdeka apēlthen pros tous archiereis ina paradō auton autois
oi de akousantes echarēsan kai epēngeilanto autō argyrion dounai kai ezētei pōs eukairōs auton paradō
kai tē prōtē ēmera tōn azymōn ote to pascha ethyon legousin autō oi mathētai autou pou theleis apelthontes etoimasōmen ina phagēs to pascha
kai apostellei dyo tōn mathētōn autou kai legei autois ypagete eis tēn polin kai apantēsei ymin anthrōpos keramion ydatos bastazōn akolouthēsate autō
kai opou ean eiselthē eipate tō oikodespotē oti o didaskalos legei pou estin to katalyma opou to pascha meta tōn mathētōn mou phagō
kai autos ymin deixei anōgeon mega estrōmenon etoimon ekei etoimasate ēmin
kai exēlthon oi mathētai autou kai ēlthon eis tēn polin kai euron kathōs eipen autois kai ētoimasan to pascha
kai opsias genomenēs erchetai meta tōn dōdeka
kai anakeimenōn autōn kai esthiontōn eipen o iēsous amēn legō ymin oti eis ex ymōn paradōsei me o esthiōn met emou
oi de ērxanto lypeisthai kai legein autō eis kath eis mēti egō kai allos mēti egō
o de apokritheis eipen autois eis ek tōn dōdeka o embaptomenos met emou eis to tryblion
o men uios tou anthrōpou ypagei kathōs gegraptai peri autou ouai de tō anthrōpō ekeinō di ou o uios tou anthrōpou paradidotai kalon ēn autō ei ouk egennēthē o anthrōpos ekeinos
kai esthiontōn autōn labōn o iēsous arton eulogēsas eklasen kai edōken autois kai eipen labete phagete touto estin to sōma mou
kai labōn to potērion eucharistēsas edōken autois kai epion ex autou pantes
kai eipen autois touto estin to aima mou to tēs kainēs diathēkēs to peri pollōn ekchynomenon
amēn legō ymin oti ouketi ou mē piō ek tou gennēmatos tēs ampelou eōs tēs ēmeras ekeinēs otan auto pinō kainon en tē basileia tou theou
kai ymnēsantes exēlthon eis to oros tōn elaiōn
kai legei autois o iēsous oti pantes skandalisthēsesthe en emoi en tē nykti tautē oti gegraptai pataxō ton poimena kai diaskorpisthēsetai ta probata
alla meta to egerthēnai me proaxō ymas eis tēn galilaian
o de petros ephē autō kai ei pantes skandalisthēsontai all ouk egō
kai legei autō o iēsous amēn legō soi oti sēmeron en tē nykti tautē prin ē dis alektora phōnēsai tris aparnēsē me
o de ek perissou elegen mallon ean me deē synapothanein soi ou mē se aparnēsomai ōsautōs de kai pantes elegon
kai erchontai eis chōrion ou to onoma gethsēmanē kai legei tois mathētais autou kathisate ōde eōs proseuxōmai
kai paralambanei ton petron kai ton iakōbon kai iōannēn meth eautou kai ērxato ekthambeisthai kai adēmonein
kai legei autois perilypos estin ē psychē mou eōs thanatou meinate ōde kai grēgoreite
kai proelthōn mikron epesen epi tēs gēs kai prosēucheto ina ei dynaton estin parelthē ap autou ē ōra
kai elegen abba o patēr panta dynata soi parenenke to potērion ap emou touto all ou ti egō thelō alla ti sy
kai erchetai kai euriskei autous katheudontas kai legei tō petrō simōn katheudeis ouk ischysas mian ōran grēgorēsai
grēgoreite kai proseuchesthe ina mē eiselthēte eis peirasmon to men pneuma prothymon ē de sarx asthenēs
kai palin apelthōn prosēuxato ton auton logon eipōn
kai ypostrepsas euren autous palin katheudontas ēsan gar oi ophthalmoi autōn bebarēmenoi kai ouk ēdeisan ti autō apokrithōsin
kai erchetai to triton kai legei autois katheudete to loipon kai anapauesthe apechei ēlthen ē ōra idou paradidotai o uios tou anthrōpou eis tas cheiras tōn amartōlōn
egeiresthe agōmen idou o paradidous me ēngiken
kai eutheōs eti autou lalountos paraginetai ioudas eis ōn tōn dōdeka kai met autou ochlos polys meta machairōn kai xylōn para tōn archiereōn kai tōn grammateōn kai tōn presbyterōn
dedōkei de o paradidous auton syssēmon autois legōn on an philēsō autos estin kratēsate auton kai apagagete asphalōs
kai elthōn eutheōs proselthōn autō legei rabbi rabbi kai katephilēsen auton
oi de epebalon ep auton tas cheiras autōn kai ekratēsan auton
eis de tis tōn parestēkotōn spasamenos tēn machairan epaisen ton doulon tou archiereōs kai apheilen autou to ōtion
kai apokritheis o iēsous eipen autois ōs epi lēstēn exēlthete meta machairōn kai xylōn syllabein me
kath ēmeran ēmēn pros ymas en tō ierō didaskōn kai ouk ekratēsate me all ina plērōthōsin ai graphai
kai aphentes auton pantes ephygon
kai eis tis neaniskos ēkolouthei autō peribeblēmenos sindona epi gymnou kai kratousin auton oi neaniskoi
o de katalipōn tēn sindona gymnos ephygen ap autōn
kai apēgagon ton iēsoun pros ton archierea kai synerchontai autō pantes oi archiereis kai oi presbyteroi kai oi grammateis
kai o petros apo makrothen ēkolouthēsen autō eōs esō eis tēn aulēn tou archiereōs kai ēn synkathēmenos meta tōn ypēretōn kai thermainomenos pros phōs
oi de archiereis kai olon to synedrion ezētoun kata tou iēsou martyrian eis to thanatōsai auton kai ouch euriskon
polloi gar epseudomartyroun kat autou kai isai ai martyriai ouk ēsan
kai tines anastantes epseudomartyroun kat autou legontes
oti ēmeis ēkousamen autou legontos oti egō katalysō ton naon touton ton cheiropoiēton kai dia triōn ēmerōn allon acheiropoiēton oikodomēsō
kai oude outōs isē ēn ē martyria autōn
kai anastas o archiereus eis to meson epērōtēsen ton iēsoun legōn ouk apokrinē ouden ti outoi sou katamartyrousin
o de esiōpa kai ouden apekrinato palin o archiereus epērōta auton kai legei autō sy ei o christos o uios tou eulogētou
o de iēsous eipen egō eimi kai opsesthe ton uion tou anthrōpou kathēmenon ek dexiōn tēs dynameōs kai erchomenon meta tōn nephelōn tou ouranou
o de archiereus diarrēxas tous chitōnas autou legei ti eti chreian echomen martyrōn
ēkousate tēs blasphēmias ti ymin phainetai oi de pantes katekrinan auton einai enochon thanatou
kai ērxanto tines emptyein autō kai perikalyptein to prosōpon autou kai kolaphizein auton kai legein autō prophēteuson kai oi ypēretai rapismasin auton eballon
kai ontos tou petrou en tē aulē katō erchetai mia tōn paidiskōn tou archiereōs
kai idousa ton petron thermainomenon emblepsasa autō legei kai sy meta tou nazarēnou iēsou ēstha
o de ērnēsato legōn ouk oida oude epistamai ti sy legeis kai exēlthen exō eis to proaulion kai alektōr ephōnēsen
kai ē paidiskē idousa auton palin ērxato legein tois parestēkosin oti outos ex autōn estin
o de palin ērneito kai meta mikron palin oi parestōtes elegon tō petrō alēthōs ex autōn ei kai gar galilaios ei kai ē lalia sou omoiazei
o de ērxato anathematizein kai omnyein oti ouk oida ton anthrōpon touton on legete
kai ek deuterou alektōr ephōnēsen kai anemnēsthē o petros tou rēmatos ou eipen autō o iēsous oti prin alektora phōnēsai dis aparnēsē me tris kai epibalōn eklaien
kai eutheōs epi to prōi symboulion poiēsantes oi archiereis meta tōn presbyterōn kai grammateōn kai olon to synedrion dēsantes ton iēsoun apēnenkan kai paredōkan tō pilatō
kai epērōtēsen auton o pilatos sy ei o basileus tōn ioudaiōn o de apokritheis eipen autō sy legeis
kai katēgoroun autou oi archiereis polla
o de pilatos palin epērōtēsen auton legōn ouk apokrinē ouden ide posa sou katamartyrousin
o de iēsous ouketi ouden apekrithē ōste thaumazein ton pilaton
kata de eortēn apelyen autois ena desmion onper ētounto
ēn de o legomenos barabbas meta tōn systasiastōn dedemenos oitines en tē stasei phonon pepoiēkeisan
kai anaboēsas o ochlos ērxato aiteisthai kathōs aei epoiei autois
o de pilatos apekrithē autois legōn thelete apolysō ymin ton basilea tōn ioudaiōn
eginōsken gar oti dia phthonon paradedōkeisan auton oi archiereis
oi de archiereis aneseisan ton ochlon ina mallon ton barabban apolysē autois
o de pilatos apokritheis palin eipen autois ti oun thelete poiēsō on legete basilea tōn ioudaiōn
oi de palin ekraxan staurōson auton
o de pilatos elegen autois ti gar kakon epoiēsen oi de perissoterōs ekraxan staurōson auton
o de pilatos boulomenos tō ochlō to ikanon poiēsai apelysen autois ton barabban kai paredōken ton iēsoun phragellōsas ina staurōthē
oi de stratiōtai apēgagon auton esō tēs aulēs o estin praitōrion kai synkalousin olēn tēn speiran
kai endyousin auton porphyran kai perititheasin autō plexantes akanthinon stephanon
kai ērxanto aspazesthai auton chaire basileu tōn ioudaiōn
kai etypton autou tēn kephalēn kalamō kai eneptyon autō kai tithentes ta gonata prosekynoun autō
kai ote enepaixan autō exedysan auton tēn porphyran kai enedysan auton ta imatia ta idia kai exagousin auton ina staurōsōsin auton
kai angareuousin paragonta tina simōna kyrēnaion erchomenon ap agrou ton patera alexandrou kai rouphou ina arē ton stauron autou
kai pherousin auton epi golgotha topon o estin methermēneuomenon kraniou topos
kai edidoun autō piein esmyrnismenon oinon o de ouk elaben
kai staurōsantes auton diemerizon ta imatia autou ballontes klēron ep auta tis ti arē
ēn de ōra tritē kai estaurōsan auton
kai ēn ē epigraphē tēs aitias autou epigegrammenē o basileus tōn ioudaiōn
kai syn autō staurousin dyo lēstas ena ek dexiōn kai ena ex euōnymōn autou
kai eplērōthē ē graphē ē legousa kai meta anomōn elogisthē
kai oi paraporeuomenoi eblasphēmoun auton kinountes tas kephalas autōn kai legontes oua o katalyōn ton naon kai en trisin ēmerais oikodomōn
sōson seauton kai kataba apo tou staurou
omoiōs de kai oi archiereis empaizontes pros allēlous meta tōn grammateōn elegon allous esōsen eauton ou dynatai sōsai
o christos o basileus tou israēl katabatō nyn apo tou staurou ina idōmen kai pisteusōmen kai oi synestaurōmenoi autō ōneidizon auton
genomenēs de ōras ektēs skotos egeneto eph olēn tēn gēn eōs ōras ennatēs
kai tē ōra tē ennatē eboēsen o iēsous phōnē megalē legōn elōi elōi lamma sabachthani o estin methermēneuomenon o theos mou o theos mou eis ti me enkatelipes
kai tines tōn parestēkotōn akousantes elegon idou ēlian phōnei
dramōn de eis kai gemisas spongon oxous peritheis te kalamō epotizen auton legōn aphete idōmen ei erchetai ēlias kathelein auton
o de iēsous apheis phōnēn megalēn exepneusen
kai to katapetasma tou naou eschisthē eis dyo apo anōthen eōs katō
idōn de o kentyriōn o parestēkōs ex enantias autou oti outōs kraxas exepneusen eipen alēthōs o anthrōpos outos uios ēn theou
ēsan de kai gynaikes apo makrothen theōrousai en ais ēn kai maria ē magdalēnē kai maria ē tou iakōbou tou mikrou kai iōsē mētēr kai salōmē
ai kai ote ēn en tē galilaia ēkolouthoun autō kai diēkonoun autō kai allai pollai ai synanabasai autō eis ierosolyma
kai ēdē opsias genomenēs epei ēn paraskeuē o estin prosabbaton
ēlthen iōsēph o apo arimathaias euschēmōn bouleutēs os kai autos ēn prosdechomenos tēn basileian tou theou tolmēsas eisēlthen pros pilaton kai ētēsato to sōma tou iēsou
o de pilatos ethaumasen ei ēdē tethnēken kai proskalesamenos ton kentyriōna epērōtēsen auton ei palai apethanen
kai gnous apo tou kentyriōnos edōrēsato to sōma tō iōsēph
kai agorasas sindona kai kathelōn auton eneilēsen tē sindoni kai katethēken auton en mnēmeiō o ēn lelatomēmenon ek petras kai prosekylisen lithon epi tēn thyran tou mnēmeiou
ē de maria ē magdalēnē kai maria iōsē etheōroun pou tithetai
kai diagenomenou tou sabbatou maria ē magdalēnē kai maria ē tou iakōbou kai salōmē ēgorasan arōmata ina elthousai aleipsōsin auton
kai lian prōi tēs mias sabbatōn erchontai epi to mnēmeion anateilantos tou ēliou
kai elegon pros eautas tis apokylisei ēmin ton lithon ek tēs thyras tou mnēmeiou
kai anablepsasai theōrousin oti apokekylistai o lithos ēn gar megas sphodra
kai eiselthousai eis to mnēmeion eidon neaniskon kathēmenon en tois dexiois peribeblēmenon stolēn leukēn kai exethambēthēsan
o de legei autais mē ekthambeisthe iēsoun zēteite ton nazarēnon ton estaurōmenon ēgerthē ouk estin ōde ide o topos opou ethēkan auton
all ypagete eipate tois mathētais autou kai tō petrō oti proagei ymas eis tēn galilaian ekei auton opsesthe kathōs eipen ymin
kai exelthousai tachy ephygon apo tou mnēmeiou eichen de autas tromos kai ekstasis kai oudeni ouden eipon ephobounto gar
anastas de prōi prōtē sabbatou ephanē prōton maria tē magdalēnē aph ēs ekbeblēkei epta daimonia
ekeinē poreutheisa apēngeilen tois met autou genomenois penthousin kai klaiousin
kakeinoi akousantes oti zē kai etheathē yp autēs ēpistēsan
meta de tauta dysin ex autōn peripatousin ephanerōthē en etera morphē poreuomenois eis agron
kakeinoi apelthontes apēngeilan tois loipois oude ekeinois episteusan
ysteron anakeimenois autois tois endeka ephanerōthē kai ōneidisen tēn apistian autōn kai sklērokardian oti tois theasamenois auton egēgermenon ouk episteusan
kai eipen autois poreuthentes eis ton kosmon apanta kēryxate to euangelion pasē tē ktisei
o pisteusas kai baptistheis sōthēsetai o de apistēsas katakrithēsetai
sēmeia de tois pisteusasin tauta parakolouthēsei en tō onomati mou daimonia ekbalousin glōssais lalēsousin kainais
opheis arousin kan thanasimon ti piōsin ou mē autous blapsei epi arrōstous cheiras epithēsousin kai kalōs exousin
o men oun kyrios meta to lalēsai autois anelēphthē eis ton ouranon kai ekathisen ek dexiōn tou theou
ekeinoi de exelthontes ekēryxan pantachou tou kyriou synergountos kai ton logon bebaiountos dia tōn epakolouthountōn sēmeiōn
